ip_outcome_note: Confirmed via PokemonTCG.io swsh6-41 name field. National Pokedex no. 816. Galar Water starter base form.

trivia_bullets.text: Chilling Reign (June 18, 2021) is the sixth expansion in the Sword and Shield TCG series, based on the Crown Tundra DLC. Sobble appears here as a Rapid Strike Basic, a subtype introduced in Battle Styles, grouping coordinated-strike Pokemon together.

Sobble's evolution line carries a spy/secret-agent design arc through all three stages: Sobble (chameleon + anxious child), Drizzile (brooding adolescent who lays traps), and Inteleon (the 'Secret Agent Pokemon,' National Pokedex no. 818). Sobble's own Galar Pokedex entry number is 007 — a direct wink at the James Bond designation.
sources: PokéJungle: Origin of Species Sobble, Drizzile, and Inteleon

trivia_bullets.text: "When it gets wet, its skin changes color, and this Pokemon becomes invisible as if it were camouflaged." The camouflage trait is the mechanical through-line connecting Sobble's chameleon inspiration to Inteleon's stealth-sniper role.

The 'Keep Calling' attack searches for up to 3 Basic Rapid Strike Pokemon — an unusually wide search for a Basic. In competitive play this made Sobble a functional setup piece in Rapid Strike builds during its Standard-legal window.
